scripts.build: npm run --workspace @superhub/contracts build && npm run --workspace packages/sdk build && npm run --workspace @superhub/hub build
scripts.typecheck: npm run --workspace @superhub/contracts build && npm run --workspace @superhub/contracts typecheck && npm run --workspace packages/sdk typecheck && npm run --workspace @superhub/hub typecheck
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test $(find tests -type f -name '*.test.mjs' | sort)
scripts.sdk:prepublish: npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache npm run --workspace packages/sdk build && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache npm pack --workspace packages/sdk --dry-run
scripts.publish:sdk: npm run sdk:prepublish && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache npm publish --workspace packages/sdk --access public
scripts.release:sdk:patch: npm run sdk:version:patch && npm run publish:sdk
scripts.release:sdk:minor: npm run sdk:version:minor && npm run publish:sdk
scripts.release:sdk:major: npm run sdk:version:major && npm run publish:sdk
